payload.title: MTA Report - CRIME STATISTICS OCTOBER
payload.publisher: Police Department City of New York
payload.description: NYPD MTA monthly crime statistics report for October 2024 with October and year-to-date comparisons to 2023, plus historical data and Transit Bureau hate crimes through November 3, 2024.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
